subcodes.first_line: O thou herald of the Covenant! Thy letter of the 19th of Muharram was received, and from its contents signs of contentment
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه نوزدهم شهر محرم ملاحظه گردید از مضمون آثار بشاشت و امید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
